query: SELECT a.chaveJ, a.nomeAgente, a.empresa, a.situacao FROM agentes a LEFT JOIN certificacoes c ON a.chaveJ = c.chaveJ WHERE c.chaveJ IS NULL AND a.chaveJ IS NOT NULL AND a.chaveJ != '' ORDER BY a.id DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user axRHbWZqKReZrAb.b2cf85c9ad94 --database SMgJn6AGQCNfDq7mPzPqc9 --execute SELECT a.chaveJ, a.nomeAgente, a.empresa, a.situacao FROM agentes a LEFT JOIN certificacoes c ON a.chaveJ = c.chaveJ WHERE c.chaveJ IS NULL AND a.chaveJ IS NOT NULL AND a.chaveJ != '' ORDER BY a.id DESC LIMIT 10;
